Footer.description: Professional breeding of high-quality geckos. Passion meets genetics to create incredible, healthy, and beautiful animals.

Home.heroDesc: We specialize in the professional breeding of high-quality leopard geckos with an emphasis on excellent conditions, great genetics, and unique morphs.
Home.aboutDesc: Our adventure with terrariums began with a pure passion for these amazing reptiles. Today, our mission is to breed healthy, strong, and beautiful individuals. At Navis Gecko, animal welfare comes first.
Home.aboutList1: Only healthy breeding individuals, regularly examined by veterinarians.
Home.aboutList2: Optimal diet, supplementation, and naturally arranged large habitats.
Home.aboutList3: Meticulously tracked genetics and precise matching of morphs.
Home.aboutList4: Professional support for future owners of our geckos.
Home.breedersDesc: The foundation of every great breeding project lies in exceptional genes. Allow us to introduce some key representatives of our breeding lines.
Home.noBreeders: Log in to the admin panel and check the "Our Breeding" section to add charming descriptions of your own geckos.

Available.title: Available Animals
Available.description: Browse our current offers. Each individual is described in detail. If you are interested, click "Reserve" and proceed to the form.

Contact.pageDesc: Do you have questions about specific individuals? Want to make a reservation or learn more about gecko care? Write to us!
Contact.successDesc: Thank you for contacting us. We will reply to your email as soon as possible

Caresheets.pageDesc: Short and substantive guides on breeding.
Caresheets.tempDesc: Heat requirements, basking spots, and day/night cycles...
Caresheets.dietDesc: Best feeder insects, choosing vitamins, and calcium intake...
Caresheets.terrariumDesc: Optimal enclosure size, substrate selection, and decor.
Caresheets.handlingDesc: Building trust with your gecko and avoiding unnecessary stress.
